## Crypto\_2.EncryptionHelper.decrypt() method

Decrypts an encrypted collection file.

**Signature:**

```typescript
decrypt(tombstone: IEncryptedCollectionFile, key: Uint8Array): Promise<Result<JsonObject>>;
```
